deploy.startCommand: sh -c 'case "${SERVICE_ROLE:-web}" in worker) exec celery -A chalimobile worker -l info;; beat) exec celery -A chalimobile beat -l info;; *) python manage.py migrate && python manage.py collectstatic --noinput && exec gunicorn chalimobile.wsgi:application --bind 0.0.0.0:$PORT;; esac'
